subcodes.first_line: O beloved friends, every member of the human race, as they emerge from the dawning-place of life into the realm of existence [4o]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیزان هر فردی از افراد انسانی چون از خاور زندگانی در جهان هستی
subcodes.subjects: @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @cycles in the physical and spiritual worlds, @past, present and future of Iran, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @unity; oneness of humanity, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @love and unity
